title: Sorbaria aitchisonii
taxonomy: Sorbaria aitchisonii is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, native to China and the Himalayas. It is classified as a member of the genus Sorbaria, which is a group of deciduous shrubs. Within the Rosaceae family, Sorbaria aitchisonii is part of the order Rosales, which includes many other flowering plants like roses and apples. The classification of Sorbaria aitchisonii is further broken down to the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. This classification system helps botanists understand the relationships between different plant species and their evolutionary history.
